title: Judgement Silversword
prompt: Original pixel art illustration inspired by a handheld vertical shoot em up. A sleek silver starfighter climbs through a dense pattern of glowing projectiles toward a colossal geometric enemy core above a dark sky. Visual focus: one ship, one boss core, readable in 1 second. Style: premium monochrome pixel art with handheld-era limitations, crisp sprite shading, WonderSwan-inspired portable screen feeling, strong contrast, no blur. Mood: intense, futuristic, precise. Composition: vertical action framed within a compact scene, minimal clutter beyond bullet patterns. Important: do not replicate official Judgement Silversword ship art, logos, UI, or exact boss designs. Must feel original but clearly evoke elite handheld shmup action.
negative_prompt: official Judgement Silversword art, logo, text, exact ship design, exact bullet pattern, realistic 3D
